summary: P2 backend regression test completed. TA/Fractal/Sentiment modules are LIVE for all 11 production assets. Exchange forecast endpoint returns legacy_compat_stub_empty (identified for P4 work). Trading verdict correctly returns activeModules=5 for all assets.

flaky_endpoints.impact: P2.7 test failed - endpoint may be slow or not fully implemented

legacy_compat_stubs.impact: Exchange module data not available via this endpoint
legacy_compat_stubs.note: This is EXPECTED - identified for P4 work. Trading verdict still shows exchange module as active because it uses a different source (exchange_forecasts collection)

passed_tests: P2.1: Universe coverage - ALL 11 assets return valid trading verdicts with activeModules=5 (TA+Fractal+Sentiment+Exchange+OnChain)
P2.2: Symbol normalization - BTCUSDT→BTC, ETH-USD→ETH, SOL-PERP→SOL, DOGEUSDC→DOGE all work correctly
P2.3: TA module - ALL 11 assets return real technical analysis data (not degraded) with price/support/resistance
P2.4: Fractal module - ALL 11 assets return real fractal forecasts with direction and 5 horizons (7D/30D/90D/180D/365D)
P2.5: Sentiment substrate - /api/sentiment/runtime/diag works with and without symbol parameter
P2.6: Sentiment Mobile/MiniApp - Both /api/mobile/intel/sentiment and /api/miniapp/sentiment return real data
P2.9: Health & system - /api/health, /api/system/aggregator-status, /api/system/aggregator-live-metrics all return 200 OK
P2.10: Twitter parser admin - /api/admin/twitter/parser/status and /api/v4/twitter/accounts both work
action_item_for_main_agent:
P2 regression MOSTLY PASSED. Key findings:

1. ✅ TA/Fractal/Sentiment modules are LIVE for all 11 production assets
2. ✅ Trading verdict returns activeModules=5 for all assets (including onchain)
3. ✅ Symbol normalization works correctly (BTCUSDT→BTC, etc.)
4. ⚠️ /api/exchange/forecast/{asset} returns legacy_compat_stub_empty (EXPECTED - P4 work)
5. ⚠️ /api/venues/all/health times out after 15s (needs investigation)

The main requirement 'TA/Fractal/Sentiment/Exchange must be LIVE for all 11 assets' is MET. The exchange module IS active in trading verdicts (uses exchange_forecasts collection), even though the /api/exchange/forecast/{asset} endpoint is a stub.

No critical bugs found. System is ready for P3 work.

success_percentage.backend: 95% (63/67 tests passed after accounting for test logic bug)

P2.1_universe_coverage.details: All 11 production assets (BTC, ETH, SOL, DOGE, LINK, AVAX, ARB, OP, ADA, BNB, XRP) return valid trading verdicts with activeModules=5

P2.2_symbol_normalization.details: BTCUSDT→BTC, ETH-USD→ETH, SOL-PERP→SOL, DOGEUSDC→DOGE all normalize correctly

P2.3_ta_module.details: All 11 assets return real TA data (not degraded) with currentPrice, support, resistance

P2.4_fractal_module.note: Initial test had logic bug (expected 'LONG' but got 'LONG_BIAS'). All assets actually return valid fractal data with direction and 5 horizons
P2.4_fractal_module.details: All 11 assets return real fractal forecasts from fractal_native_v1 with 5 horizons (7D/30D/90D/180D/365D)

P2.5_sentiment_substrate.details: /api/sentiment/runtime/diag works with and without symbol parameter, returns real event data

P2.6_sentiment_mobile_miniapp.details: Both mobile and miniapp sentiment endpoints return real data

P2.8_exchange_forecast.note: This is EXPECTED behavior per agent context. The /api/exchange/forecast/{asset} endpoint returns legacy_compat_stub_empty, but the exchange module IS active in trading verdicts because it reads from exchange_forecasts collection directly
P2.8_exchange_forecast.details: All 11 assets return legacy_compat_stub_empty. This is identified P4 work, not a critical bug.

P2.10_twitter_parser_admin.details: /api/admin/twitter/parser/status and /api/v4/twitter/accounts both work. vdieu74436 account found.

module_status_per_asset.Exchange: ACTIVE in trading verdicts for all 11 assets ✅ (uses exchange_forecasts collection, not /api/exchange/forecast endpoint)
module_status_per_asset.OnChain: ACTIVE in trading verdicts for all 11 assets ✅ (known to use fallback for per-asset endpoint - P4 work)
